name: highlight.js
when_to_use: 手上有代码但不确定语言、或需一次性支持大量语言并自动识别(automatic language detection)时用它。已知语言且要高保真 TextMate 着色用 shiki;要极轻量用 speed-highlight;prism 亦可——这三者都必须显式指定语言,唯 highlight.js 能自动判定。
why_valuable: highlight.js 是唯一带自动语言检测的高亮器(190+ 语言),拿到一段未知语言的代码也能判定并着色;AI 手写高亮既慢又不准、且要求先知道语言,更做不到跨语言自动识别。着色靠 highlight()/highlightAuto() 产出的 HTML + 一张主题 CSS。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you have code but do not know its language, or need one-time support for many languages with automatic language detection. For a known language and high-fidelity TextMate coloring, use shiki; for a very lightweight option, use speed-highlight; prism is another option. All three require an explicit language, while only highlight.js can detect it automatically.
en.why_valuable: highlight.js is the only highlighter with automatic language detection across 190+ languages, so it can identify and color an unknown code fragment. AI-written highlighting is slow and inaccurate, requires the language in advance, and cannot detect languages across a broad set. Coloring uses the HTML produced by highlight()/highlightAuto() plus one theme CSS file.

data_in.note: code is the complete source to color; when language is omitted, highlightAuto performs automatic detection. Coloring requires one theme CSS file from styles/*.min.css. artifact/codex may link it into the current page head (hard rule 2: owned document); a widget must place it in shadowRoot. The default +esm entry includes all 190+ languages, which is large but gives the broadest auto-detection. If only common languages are needed, use /lib/common.

schema.language?: string - highlight.js language id such as 'python'/'rust'/'json'; omit it to use highlightAuto automatic detection
schema.theme?: string - theme name such as 'github'/'github-dark'/'default'; boot loads styles/<theme>.min.css accordingly, default 'default'
schema.ignoreIllegals?: boolean - ignore illegal syntax without throwing when language is specified; boot default true

spec.note: highlight.js only produces colored <span> elements and does not set a height. This is the recommended height for the scrolling <pre><code> carrier, default 360px while allowing content to expand. Do not use vh or percentage heights (hard rule 3).

data_in.note: code 是要着色的代码全文;language 省略则走 highlightAuto 自动检测。着色需一张主题 CSS(styles/*.min.css):artifact/codex 可 link 进本页 head(铁律 2:自有 document),widget 必须落进 shadowRoot。默认 +esm 入口含全部 190+ 语言(体积大但自动检测最全);仅需常见语言可换 /lib/common。

schema.code: string —— 要高亮的代码全文
schema.language?: string —— highlight.js 语言 id(如 'python'/'rust'/'json');省略则 highlightAuto 自动检测
schema.theme?: string —— 主题名(如 'github'/'github-dark'/'default'),boot 据此加载 styles/<theme>.min.css,默认 'default'
schema.ignoreIllegals?: boolean —— 指定 language 时忽略非法语法不报错,boot 默认 true

spec.note: highlight.js 只产 <span> 着色不设高度;此为承载 <pre><code> 的滚动容器建议高度(默认 360px,内容可撑开),禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: 核心差异化是「不指定语言即可着色」;minimal 钉死自动检测形态(省略 language),并展示可选深色主题。

minimal.code:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;highlightAuto 检测到的语言 res.language 可展示,消费 AI 如需回传自行导出。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 如需回传检测语言/代码,在确认控件读取 res.language 后拼 sendPrompt;本条不焊接统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 读取 res.language/code 后自行调用 sendFollowUpMessage。

carriers.widget: supported:hljs.highlight 只产 HTML 字符串,着色 DOM 与主题 CSS 都落 shadowRoot;JS 本身不写 head
carriers.codex: supported:纯 ESM tokenizer + 一张主题 CSS,无 worker/wasm 依赖

isolation.evidence: highlight.js@11.11.1 +esm default export `hljs` (export{ec as HighlightJS,ec as default}) — import hljs default correct. types/index.d.ts: highlight(code, {language, ignoreIllegals?}):HighlightResult (L32) returning {value:string, language, relevance}; highlightAuto(code, languageSubset?):AutoHighlightResult (L35); highlightElement(element):void (L37); registerLanguage/listLanguages (L42/44) — boot uses highlight()/highlightAuto() exactly. globalStyleInjection=no: the library JS injects no CSS — 0 document.head, 0 createElement('style'); coloring requires a separate theme stylesheet from highlight.js@11.11.1/styles/*.min.css (exports map exposes ./styles/*; default/github/github-dark .min.css all verified 200), which boot loads into document.head (artifact/codex, own document) or shadowRoot (widget) per iron-law #2. highlight()/highlightAuto() are pure functions returning escaped HTML strings (no document/window touch). The single window.addEventListener in the bundle lives INSIDE highlightAll() (DOMContentLoaded auto-run) which this boot never calls — so no listener registered and no document-wide mutation for the highlight()/highlightAuto() path. Only optional highlightElement (unused) would mutate a passed element in place. Default +esm entry registers all ~190 languages (enables highlightAuto); lib/common is a lighter subset. → shadow-safe.
